# Roadmap

## v0.1 Public toolkit foundation

- README landing page
- core templates and checklists
- source notes and disclaimer

## v0.2 Interactive readiness self-check

- GitHub Pages mini-site
- lightweight self-check and navigation improvements

## v0.3 Sector-specific SME examples

- practical examples for common SME use cases
- clearer provider/deployer scenarios

## v0.4 Vendor assessment pack

- stronger procurement questionnaire
- evidence and decision capture for supplier review

## v0.5 Multilingual summaries

- concise translated overviews for wider SME use

## v1.0 Stable public toolkit

- stable documentation set
- predictable template structure
- regular review cadence and versioned updates
